Migrate GPT to LAI

LayerAI Begins the Final Stage of the Rebrand: Migrate Old GPT to New LAI.

The final stage of our rebrand involves the migration of the token's smart contract.

The new token contracts

ETH0x168e209D7b2F58f1f24b8Ae7B7d35E662bBF11Cc
BSC0x776F9987D9DEED90eeD791cbD824D971FD5CCF09

Connect your wallet below in order to migrate the old token for the new token. The old token will be burned in the process and you will receive the new token.

This is a crucial step for the future of LayerAI to remove any vulnerabilities associated with the Multichain bridge.

Join the AI Revolution
